zh.lifeSummary: 當Timothy Baldwin於1661年5月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，他的父親Henry Baldwin38歲，母親Phebe Richardson28歲。他於1687年6月2日與Elizabeth Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1735年3月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年73歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Timothy Baldwin于1661年5月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，他的父亲Henry Baldwin38岁，母亲Phebe Richardson28岁。他于1687年6月2日与Elizabeth Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1735年3月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年73岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州。

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and North German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’, which was extremely popular among the Normans and in Flanders in the early Middle Ages. It was the personal name of the Crusader who in 1100 became the first Christian king of Jerusalem, and of four more Crusader kings of Jerusalem. It was also borne by Baldwin, Count of Flanders (1172–1205), leader of the Fourth Crusade, who became first Latin Emperor of Constantinople (1204). In North America, this surname has absorbed Dutch forms such as Boudewijn.
Irish: surname adopted in Donegal by bearers of the Gaelic surname Ó Maolagáin (see Milligan ), due to association of Gaelic maol ‘bald, hairless’ with English bald.
History: A John Baldwin from Buckinghamshire, England, arrived in the US in 1638 and settled in Milford, CT.

variants.name: Milligan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolagáin ‘descendant of Maoileagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of maol meaning ‘bald’ or ‘tonsured’.

variants.name: Baldovino
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Philippines and Colombia) and Italian: from the personal name Baldovino, from ancient Germanic Baldowin (see Baldwin ).

variants.name: Bellmann
meanings: North German:
habitational name for someone from Belle in Westphalia, Bell in the Rhineland, or Bellen near Bremen.
in Saxony, from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name   Baldwin  .

variants.name: Bais
meanings: Dutch (mainly North Holland): patronymic from the personal name Baije, which is a derivative of an ancient Germanic name beginning with the element bern- ‘bear’, or possibly a variant of Boije, which may be a derivative of Boidin and thus a variant of Baldwin .
Italian (Friuli Venezia Giulia and Trentino-South Tyrol): nickname derived from German weiss ‘white’.

Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Bajs: nickname from dialect bajs ‘bass’ (the musical instrument), figuratively ‘fatty, potbelly’. The surname in the form Bais is found in Croatia, too, where it is a less common variant.

variants.name: Baudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Etienne, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Firmin, Francoise, Jean-Yves, Laurent, Minos, Sylvain.
French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Boudoin 1 and Bowdoin .
Altered form of French   Beaudoin  , a cognate (variant) of 1 above.

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Balkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Herschel.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Beyle meaning ‘beautiful’ (related to French belle).

English (of Norman origin): perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Baldekin, Baudekin, an Anglo-Norman borrowing of Middle Dutch Baudequin, a Flemish pet form of Baldwin . However, a clear link between Middle English Baudekin and post-medieval Balkin has not been established, and the modern name may have a different source, a variant of Balcom perhaps, by migration.

variants.name: Bawden
meanings: English: from a late variant of the Norman personal name   Baldwin   or a variant of   Bowden  .

variants.name: Baldon
meanings: English: habitational name from either Marsh Baldon or Toot Baldon in Oxfordshire, from the Old English personal name Bealda + dūn ‘hill’, or a variant of Baldwin . Occasionally the name may be from Baildon in Yorkshire (named with Old English bēgel ‘bend’ + dūn ‘hill’; recorded as Baldon in the 16th century), or from Ballidon in Derbyshire (named with Old English belg ‘bag, sack’ + denu ‘valley’).
English: variant of   Boldon  .
Italian (Veneto): from an augmentative of the personal name   Baldo  .

variants.name: Beaudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Serge, Jacques, Gilles, Laurent, Normand, Pierre, Alcide, Lucien, Raoul.

French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Baudoin , Baudouin , Beaudion , Boadway , Boardway , Bodeau , Bodoh , Bodway , Boudway , and Budway .

nameMeanings.name: Timothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form, used in the Authorized Version of the Bible (alongside the Latin form Timotheus), of the Greek name Timotheos, from timē ‘honour’ + theos ‘god’. This was the name of a companion of St Paul; according to tradition, he was stoned to death for denouncing the worship of Diana . It was not used in England before the Reformation but has been in steady use since the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Timothy Baldwin was born on 27 May 1661, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Baldwin, was 38 and his mother, Phebe Richardson, was 28. He married Elizabeth Hill on 2 June 1687, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 March 1735, in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Massachusetts, United States.

fr.Charleston, Boston, Massachusetts Bay,: Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Timothy Baldwin est né le 27 mai 1661, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Baldwin, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Phebe Richardson, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hill le 2 juin 1687, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1735, à Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Timothy Baldwin am 27. Mai 1661 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Baldwin 38 und seine Mutter Phebe Richardson 28. Er hat am 2. Juni 1687 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. März 1735 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Timothy Baldwin è nato il il 27 maggio 1661 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henry Baldwin, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Phebe Richardson, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hill il 2 giugno 1687, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1735, nel Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Timothy Baldwinが1661年5月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Henry Baldwinは38歳，母Phebe Richardsonは28歳であった。1687年6月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでElizabeth Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1735年3月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハムで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Timothy Baldwin(이)가 1661년 5월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Baldwin(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Phebe Richardson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1687년 6월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Elizabeth Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1735년 3월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Timothy Baldwin nasceu em 27 de maio de 1661, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Baldwin, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Phebe Richardson, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hill em 2 de junho de 1687, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1735, em Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Timothy Baldwin родился 27 мая 1661 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Baldwin было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Phebe Richardson, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hill 2 июня 1687 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 марта 1735 г. в местности стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Timothy Baldwin nació el 27 de mayo de 1661, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Baldwin, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Phebe Richardson, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hill el 2 de junio de 1687, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1735, en Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
